def: A vegetable parasite subsisting in the interior of the body.

Pertaining to, or derived from, a ferricyanide. Ferricyanicacid (Chem.), a brown crystalline substance, H6(CN)12Fe2, obtainedfrom potassium ferricyanide, and regarded as the type of theferricyanides; -- called also hydro-ferricyanic acid, hydrogenferricyanide, etc.
So as to prevent or hinder.
Telephotographic; specif., designating a lens consisting of acombination of lenses specially designed to give a large image of adistant object in a camera of relatively short focal length.

A globular, hard, indolent tumor, situated somewhere on atendon, and commonly formed by the effusion of a viscid fluid intoit; -- called also weeping sinew. Ganglion cell, a nerve cell. SeeIllust. under Bipolar.
A gatherer of cods or peas. [Obs. or Prov.] Johnson.
The brow or hairy arch above the eye. Shak.
Full of knots; hard; tough; hence, capable of enduring orresisting much.
